novel_features.name: Full-Text Game Search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across locally synced games, expansions, and accessories
novel_features.rationale: Requires a domain SQLite index over synced thing rows; the XMLAPI2 search is name-prefix only, so offline full-text lookup is something the raw API cannot do

novel_features.name: Local Analytics
novel_features.description: Aggregate queries (group-by, counts, averages) over locally synced BoardGameGeek data
novel_features.rationale: Only possible with a local SQLite store populated from the API; BGG exposes no aggregate endpoints

novel_features.name: Compound Workflows
novel_features.description: Chain multiple API operations (search then thing-detail then collection) in one invocation
novel_features.rationale: Combines several boardgamegeek.com/xmlapi2 calls behind one agent-friendly command

gaps.detail: BGG XML places ids in element attributes (<item id="13">), which normalize to @id; the profiler's IDField inference looks for id/_id keys, so synced rows have no extractable id and offline sync/cache is incomplete. Live queries are unaffected. A sync follow-up would map @id to id.
As of 2025-07-02 the XMLAPI2 requires a registered-application Bearer token (approval can take a week). Public anonymous access is gone, so a live smoke test is gated on token approval.
The generated analytics command ships generic placeholder examples that are not BoardGameGeek-specific.

quickstart.description: Search for games by name across the BGG database
Full detail for a game (Catan, id 13) including rating and rank stats
The live BoardGameGeek Hot list for board games
Check CLI health and API reachability

recipes.description: A public user profile including the buddy list
A user's owned game collection with per-game rating and rank
Logged play sessions for a user
